title: Colorful Sheared Sheep
description: Fixes sheep parity with bedrock, so you can see their color when sheared (Fresh Animations Compatible!)
body:
Have you ever been infuriated that your Minecraft Sheep don't show their dye color?

## Introducing Colorful Sheared Sheep!
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MUXWuCE8/images/fbf749e8e7bbdaaa72f8b0de93d2efa2cf962f42.png)

With this pack, Sheep will retain their dye color, even when sheared!

Compatible with Fresh Animations!

__Please note this pack does require OptiFine__
